name: Luna Everyday Cotton Shirt
description: A breathable everyday shirt with a relaxed fit, button front, and soft cotton finish for all-day comfort.
care_instructions: Machine wash cold with similar colors. Tumble dry low. Warm iron if needed.

name: Noir Slim Fit Denim Jeans
description: Stretch denim jeans with a slim silhouette, mid-rise waist, and clean finish for smart casual wear.
care_instructions: Wash inside out in cold water. Do not bleach. Line dry away from direct sunlight.

name: Sienna Floral Summer Dress
description: A lightweight midi dress with floral print, adjustable straps, and a flowing silhouette for warm weather.
care_instructions: Hand wash separately in cold water. Do not wring. Dry flat in shade.

name: Harbor Linen Overshirt
description: A lightweight overshirt designed for layering, with front pockets and a naturally textured linen blend.
care_instructions: Machine wash gentle in cold water. Hang to dry. Steam to remove wrinkles.

name: Metro Performance Polo
description: Moisture-wicking polo shirt with four-way stretch and wrinkle-resistant fabric for travel or active days.
care_instructions: Machine wash cold. Do not use fabric softener. Tumble dry low.

name: Willow Straight Leg Trousers
description: Tailored straight-leg trousers with front pleats and a high-rise waist suited for office and evening wear.
care_instructions: Dry clean recommended. Cool iron on reverse side if required.

name: Cloud Soft Knit Cardigan
description: A soft button-front cardigan with ribbed cuffs and a cozy lightweight knit for transitional weather.
care_instructions: Hand wash cold. Reshape while damp. Dry flat.

name: Urban Cargo Joggers
description: Tapered cargo joggers with elastic cuffs, utility pockets, and a comfortable waistband for casual wear.
care_instructions: Machine wash cold with dark colors. Do not bleach. Tumble dry low.

name: Aura Satin Blouse
description: Elegant satin blouse with a soft drape, concealed placket, and subtle sheen for dressy occasions.
care_instructions: Hand wash cold or dry clean. Do not tumble dry. Use low iron if needed.

name: Trail Water-Resistant Jacket
description: A lightweight hooded jacket with water-resistant finish, zip pockets, and breathable mesh lining.
care_instructions: Machine wash cold on gentle cycle. Hang dry. Do not iron.

name: Weekend Graphic Tee
description: Relaxed-fit crew neck t-shirt with a vintage-inspired graphic print and soft washed feel.
care_instructions: Machine wash cold inside out. Do not bleach. Tumble dry low.

name: Celeste Pleated Midi Skirt
description: Flowing pleated midi skirt with elastic waistband and lightweight layers for elevated daywear.
care_instructions: Hand wash cold. Do not wring. Hang to dry in shade.
